title: polyscias acuminata
intro: Polyscias acuminata, also known as the 'Makura', is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae, native to tropical regions of Australia and New Guinea. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Polyscias acuminata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for medicinal use, and it is also used in topical applications such as creams and ointments to treat skin conditions.
